title: centella cryptocarpa
intro: Centella cryptocarpa, also known as the South African centella or yellow-eyed grass, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the family Apiaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation, improving skin and wound healing, and supporting liver and kidney function. Centella cryptocarpa is often prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or capsules, and can also be used topically in creams or ointments to harness its medicinal properties.
